feedback_text:
DIAGNOSIS: The content is technically accurate and well-structured but fails primarily on length - it exceeds the 600-word target by an estimated 50-100 words. All other criteria are performing at 50% or better, indicating solid foundational quality that just needs tightening for concision.

DO NOT CHANGE (these sections are passing):
  ✓ expl_accuracy.qkv_correctness: Strong Q/K/V explanations with clear mechanisms - keep unchanged
  ✓ expl_accuracy.attention_math: Solid dot product and softmax explanations - preserve technical content
  ✓ expl_accuracy.multihead_purpose: Good explanation of specialized relationship types - maintain
  ✓ expl_accessibility.jargon_handling: All technical terms well-defined - keep definitions
  ✓ expl_accessibility.analogy_quality: Instagram analogy maps correctly and is memorable - preserve
  ✓ expl_accessibility.progressive_complexity: Good scaffolding from familiar to technical - maintain structure
  ✓ expl_engagement.hook: Strong opening with phone texting example - keep unchanged
  ✓ expl_engagement.tone: Natural conversational voice throughout - preserve

REQUIRED FIXES (ordered by point impact):

  FIX 1: expl_engagement.concision (current: 0%, 2.8 pts at stake)
    Failed check: Under 600 words total?
    Expected: ≤600 words for full points (1.0), ≤800 words for partial (0.7)
    Found: estimated ~650-700 words
    → ACTION: Cut the text to exactly 600 words or fewer. Remove the sentence 'Pretty neat trick for something that started as a better way to translate sentences, right?' and condense the multi-head explanation by combining the friend expertise examples into one shorter sentence.
